name: Zygarde

forms.pokedexDescription: Born when around 10% of Zygarde's cells have been gathered from all over, this form is skilled in close-range combat.

forms.name: 10%-C
forms.pokedexDescription: Born when around 10% of Zygarde's cells have been gathered from all over, this form is skilled in close-range combat.

forms.name: 50%-C
forms.pokedexDescription: Some say it can change to an even more powerful form when battling those who threaten the ecosystem.

forms.name: Complete
forms.pokedexDescription: This is Zygarde’s perfected form. From the orifice on its chest, it radiates high-powered energy that eliminates everything.

forms.name: Mega
forms.pokedexDescription: In response to people's emotions during an unprecedented crisis, Zygarde Mega Evolves and calms the situation with its unmatched power.

pokedexDescription: It's hypothesized that it's monitoring those who destroy the ecosystem from deep in the cave where it lives.
